name: shallowswe-ceiling-v0.1
description: Pinned-ceiling panel for ShallowSWE task admission. The primary row is the admission gate. Smoke rows are optional independent diagnostics only; they are never fallbacks, cascades, ceiling evidence, or scored substitutes.

ceiling_policy.smoke_rule: Run N=1 across all 36 tasks before high-N floor calibration to catch prompt, verifier, and task-scope ambiguity.
ceiling_policy.admission_rule: On the frozen task set, the primary Extra High ceiling must clear the pre-registered 75% one-shot gate. At N=16, 12/16 accepts, 11/16 investigates, and <=10/16 fixes or evicts. If investigating a primary-ceiling failure, run the smoke audit row as a separate one-shot diagnostic. It never inherits state, never continues the primary run, never counts as a fallback success, and never satisfies the formal ceiling gate.
